prompt: We need to add SAML SSO to our auth — basic-auth (ft001) only does password+TOTP today and the new external partner integration needs SAML. Use the infinifu:idea-feature skill. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.
eval_intent_note: Original intent was 'should re-route to idea-extend' but the seeded adr0001 explicitly states 'External SSO would require a new feature, not extending ft001' — the ADR directs the agent to treat this as a genuine new-feature ask. Assertions updated to reward the correct path: read adr0001, decide *new feature*, hit gate.

assertions.text: Agent surveyed ft001 (basic-auth) — output references ft001 by id
Agent surveyed adr0001 — output references adr0001 by id
Agent used adr0001's content to drive the routing decision (recognizes the ADR pre-decides this is new-feature territory, not extend)
Agent identified a real category — output references cat001 (security) or cat003 (infrastructure)
Agent stopped at the design-approval gate — gate_reached.md exists OR no sp###.md was emitted
Agent did NOT mint a new ft###.md (skill rule — ft### only minted at spec-writing)
If sp###.md was emitted: lives under docs/notes/spec/, frontmatter status: idea, body has ## problem
